titleStmt.title: SII 33.47: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 47. (A.R. No. 153 of 1946.) Kopparti, Cuddapah Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Two slabs lying near the Āñjānēya temple.
This is dated Śaka 1488, Parābhava, Vaiśākha śu. 15. corresponding to 1567 A.D., April 15, Wednesday.

Damaged. Seems to record the repairs to the Rāmataṭāka (tank) at Kṛishṇarāyapuraagrahāra near Kopparti and the construction of a sluice to it. The name of the person who repaired is not clear but in the ancestry, the names of Garidiju Bōkarāju and Gaṅgarāju are mentioned, who seem to be the grandfather and father respectively of the person. It is also said that this was dedicated to Alamelumaṅga and Veṅkatēśvara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svasti
śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana
śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1488 Agunēṭi
parābhava saṁvatsara vaiśākha śu 15
puṇyakālamuna śrī madyajanādi
ṣaṭka¨rmanirata naṁdavarāgrahā
rastitāśēṣa vidvanmahājana vā
nā mataṁsātraya gotrāna
khādhyāyu
laina gariḍiju bōkarāju pāṁ
truṁḍaina gaṁgarāju putru
koppa¨rti

2 na siṁggayaja kṛṣṇarāya
purāgrahāra rāmatāṭakamu
Ū¨rjitamu śēsi Allame
lumaṁggā samēta śrīveṁka
ṭēśvara¨rpaṇamuga dharmā
¨rdhaṁ Uttarapu tūmu
kaṭṭiṁccināru śrī śrīṁjē
yun
Digital edition of SII 33.47 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
